name: token-saving-plugin
description: Optimize natural language prompts into lightweight model-specific formats for ChatGPT, Cursor, and Codex.

promptOptimizer.transformationEngine.description: Choose whether to optimize prompts with local rules or a configured model endpoint.

promptOptimizer.outputLanguage.description: Prefer English output or preserve the user's original language.

promptOptimizer.remote.provider.description: Remote provider type. Ollama works well for local free models; openai-compatible works with compatible hosted APIs.

promptOptimizer.remote.baseUrl.description: Base URL for the remote model endpoint. Example for Ollama: http://127.0.0.1:11434/v1

promptOptimizer.remote.apiKey.markdownDescription: API key for openai-compatible providers. Leave empty for local Ollama.

promptOptimizer.remote.model.description: Remote model name. Use any available free or local model name supported by your provider.

promptOptimizer.remote.temperature.description: Sampling temperature for remote model optimization.

promptOptimizer.remote.timeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for remote model requests.

promptOptimizer.remote.systemPrompt.description: Optional custom system prompt for the remote model.

promptOptimizer.remote.fallbackToLocal.description: Fall back to local rule-based optimization if the remote request fails.
